    A

    addLog(String) - Method in class com.mycompany.lab2.model.MusicLibrary
    Adds an entry to the activity log.
    addPlaylist(String) - Method in class com.mycompany.lab2.model.MusicLibrary
    Adds a new playlist with the given name.
    addSong(Song) - Method in class com.mycompany.lab2.model.MusicLibrary

    addSong(Song) - Method in class com.mycompany.lab2.model.Playlist
    Adds a new song to the playlist.

    Adds a song to a specified playlist.
    APP_LIBRARY_KEY - Static variable in class com.mycompany.lab2.resources.AppBootstrap
    ServletContext attribute key under which the shared library is stored.
    AppBootstrap - Class in com.mycompany.lab2.resources
    Application bootstrap that creates a single MusicLibrary instance for the whole app lifecycle.

    Removes the shared MusicLibrary reference from the context on shutdown.

    Exception thrown when attempting to add a duplicate song to the music library.
